titleStmt.title: SII 9.111: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 121. (A.R. No. 522 of 1915.) ON THE STONE BEAM SUPPORTING THE MANDAPA IN A FIELD AT CHINNATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 974, Nandana, Pushya, ba. 2, Bṛihaspativāra corresponding probably to A.D. 1052 December 10 (ba. 2 of Mārgaśira, Pushya being suppressed) and refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva. It records that, when his feudatory Vīra-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍi alias Vīran Oḷamba-Ghaṭṭidēva was ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand, a gift of the village Tuṁbala was made to Ma[hāvādībhaśa]kti-Paṇḍita, disciple of Vīramahēśvara-Pandita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanrāśayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravardhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdapallavānvaya śrīpṛthvīvallabha pallavakuḷatiḷaka
nēkavākya kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrīmadvīranoḷaṁbapallavapermmānaḍigaḷappa śrīmadvīranoḷaṁba ghaṭṭidēvar sindavāḍi sāsiramaṁ sukhasaṁ

nandanasaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 2 bṛhaspativāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyanduvīramahēsvarapaṇṇitara śiṣyaru
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇajapasamādhisampannarappa śrīmanmahāvādībhaśaktipaṇḍitargge
dhārāpūrvakaṁmāḍi tuṁbaḷasthānamaṁ koṭṭu bhōgēśvaradēvara bhōgakke samastatējasvāmyamoḷagāgi Ā
biṭṭukoṭṭarddēvara parisūtradoḷage sīmādaṇḍadōsa ṭṭittella dēvargge Ī dharmmamenārōrvvaraḷidargge vāraṇāsiyoḷ
prayāgeyoḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ kavileyumu koṁda dōṣamakku .
svadatta paradatta vā
yō ha
rēdvasu
ndharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
